name: Singular Mobile Attribution API
what_it_does: Singular REST API for mobile measurement and marketing analytics platform. Enables AI agents to query campaign attribution data, retrieve marketing ROI analytics, access cross-channel spend and performance data, and integrate mobile measurement intelligence into growth and marketing workflows. Singular combines MMP attribution with marketing data ETL capabilities.
use_cases: Querying cross-channel marketing ROI and ROAS data from growth analytics agents
Retrieving campaign attribution and user acquisition cost data from marketing analytics agents
Accessing unified marketing spend and performance data from BI pipeline agents
Integrating Singular attribution data into marketing mix modeling and budget agents
not_for: Web-only analytics without mobile app measurement
Simple UTM tracking without MMP-level attribution
best_when: A mobile app marketing team using Singular wants AI agents to surface cross-channel ROI, analyze campaign performance, and integrate unified marketing intelligence into growth decision workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution data includes device identifiers and behavioral signals. GDPR, CCPA, and Apple ATT compliance required.

auth.notes: Singular API key authentication. API keys from Singular dashboard. Account-level access for reporting APIs.

pricing.notes: Enterprise MMP + marketing analytics platform. Contact Singular for pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply per account; reporting queries can be slow for large date ranges

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution data includes device IDs — GDPR, CCPA, ATT compliance
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Reporting API queries for large date ranges can be slow — use async/background pattern
ATT framework on iOS limits attribution coverage — expect null data for opted-out users
Singular's ETL capabilities also allow third-party data import — understand data model
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution with device IDs and behavioral signals. GDPR, CCPA, ATT compliance. SOC2. API key auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mobile attribution behavioral data and device IDs. GDPR, CCPA, ATT compliance. SOC2.
